Title: User Creation Success
Preconditions: No existing user with the same username.
Test Data:
- Username: testuser123
- Password: testpassword
- Name: John
- Surname: Doe
- Localization: Valid location
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user creation page.
2. Enter the username, password, name, surname, and localization.
3. Click on the "Create User" button.
4. Wait for the system response.
Expected Result:
- User creation is successful.
- User is redirected to the home page.

Title: User Creation Failure - Invalid Localization
Preconditions: No existing user with the same username.

- Username: testuser123

- Name: John
- Surname: Doe
- Localization: Invalid location
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user creation page.
2. Enter the username, password, name, surname, and invalid localization.
3. Click on the "Create User" button.
4. Wait for the system response.
Expected Result:

- User is redirected to the home page.

Title: Posting a Comment Successfully
Preconditions: A user is logged in and a post exists.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the post details page.
3. Enter the comment text.
4. Click on the "Post Comment" button.
5. Wait for the system response.
Expected Result:
- Comment is posted successfully.
- User is redirected to the post details page.

Title: Posting a Comment with Empty Text
Preconditions: A user is logged in and a post exists.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the post details page.
3. Enter an empty comment text.
4. Click on the "Post Comment" button.
5. Wait for the system response.
Expected Result:
- Comment posting fails due to empty text.
- User is redirected to the post details page with an error message.

Title: Posting a Comment with Invalid Text
Preconditions: A user is logged in and a post exists.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the post details page.
3. Enter invalid comment text.
4. Click on the "Post Comment" button.
5. Wait for the system response.
Expected Result:
- Comment posting fails due to invalid text.
- User is redirected to the post details page with an error message.

Title: Navigating to Chat List
Preconditions: A user is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the chat section.
3. Click on the "Access Chat" icon.
4. Wait for the chat list to load.
Expected Result:
- Chat list is loaded successfully.
- User is presented with the chat list.

Title: Navigating to Chat List with No Chats
Preconditions: A user is logged in and no chats exist.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the chat section.
3. Click on the "Access Chat" icon.
4. Wait for the chat list to load.
Expected Result:
- Chat list is empty.
- User is informed that there are no chats available.

Title: Navigating to Profile Page
Preconditions: A user is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the home page.
3. Click on the profile picture.
4. Wait for the profile page to load.
Expected Result:
- Profile page is loaded successfully.
- User is presented with their profile information.

Title: Navigating to Profile Page with No Profile Information
Preconditions: A user is logged in but has no profile information.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the home page.
3. Click on the profile picture.
4. Wait for the profile page to load.
Expected Result:
- Profile page is loaded but displays no information.
- User is informed that there is no profile information available.

Title: Scrolling Through Posts
Preconditions: A user is logged in and posts exist.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the general dashboard.
3. Scroll through the posts.
4. Wait for the posts to load.
Expected Result:
- Posts are loaded successfully.
- User can see all the posts in the feed.

Title: Adding a Comment to a Post
Preconditions: A user is logged in, a post exists, and the post is visible.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the general dashboard.
3. Click on a specific post.
4. Enter a comment.
5. Click on the "Add Comment" button.
6. Wait for the system response.
Expected Result:
- Comment is added successfully.
- User is redirected to the post details page.

Title: Adding a Comment with Empty Text
Preconditions: A user is logged in, a post exists, and the post is visible.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the general dashboard.
3. Click on a specific post.
4. Enter an empty comment text.
5. Click on the "Add Comment" button.
6. Wait for the system response.
Expected Result:
- Comment addition fails due to empty text.
- User is redirected to the post details page with an error message.

Title: User Creation Process - Valid Credentials

Test Steps:

2. Enter the username, password, name, surname, and localization.
3. Click on the "Create User" button.
4. Wait for the system response.
Expected Result:
- User creation is successful.
- New user entry is created in the database.
